Export Image
Choose format. PNG & TIFF preserve transparency (alpha channel). JPG/WebP are smaller but opaque.
PNG
Lossless Transparency
JPG
Lossy, No Alpha
WebP
Modern Transparency
TIFF
High Quality Transparency
BMP
Uncompressed, No Alpha

Divides the canvas into 320×160mm sections and saves each as a separate PNG file.
